metadata.purpose: Comprehensive guide to ExamRoom.AI for recruitment and HR assessment workflows
metadata.sme_focus: Assessment platform for candidate evaluation, test administration, and talent management

platform_overview.name: ExamRoom.AI
platform_overview.description: Advanced assessment platform designed to systematically develop, assess, and manage large pools of test questions and candidate evaluations

skrive_console.name: Skrive Console
skrive_console.description: Centralized application for managing and organizing test question collections (Item Bank)
skrive_console.purpose: Streamline assessment development and delivery process
key_benefits: Centralized repository for validated assessment items
Diverse validated item pool aligned with learning objectives
Ensures validity, reliability, and fairness of assessments

edison_assessments.name: Edison Assessments
edison_assessments.description: Comprehensive test administration module for managing examination lifecycle
edison_assessments.purpose: Optimize assessment process from planning to post-exam reporting

primary_responsibilities: Identify and screen candidates using standardized assessments
Interpret assessment results for hiring decisions
Ensure fair and unbiased evaluation process
Track candidate progress through assessment pipeline
key_challenges: Ensuring assessment fairness and lack of bias

multiple_choice.description: Single or multiple correct answers for objective evaluation
multiple_choice.recruiter_use: Technical skills, knowledge verification, compliance testing

true_false.description: Binary response questions for fundamental knowledge
true_false.recruiter_use: Baseline competency checks, regulatory knowledge verification

short_answer.description: Open-ended responses for complex competency evaluation

performance_based.description: Practical task-based assessment simulating job scenarios
performance_based.recruiter_use: Real-world job simulation, skill validation, practical competency

item_bank_management.definition: Centralized repository of validated assessment questions and tasks
item_bank_management.recruiter_value: Enables consistent, fair evaluation across all candidates and time periods
key_attributes: Cognitive domain mapping (recall, analysis, critical thinking)
management_capabilities: Reuse validated items across multiple assessments

recruiter_workflow.step_2: Search Item Bank for relevant assessment items
recruiter_workflow.step_3: Select items matching difficulty and cognitive levels
recruiter_workflow.step_4: Customize assessment for specific role or position
recruiter_workflow.step_6: Configure for randomization and adaptive logic

test_administration_workflow.definition: Structured process of planning, conducting, and concluding examinations to ensure fairness, security, and efficiency
core_principles: Ensure integrity and fairness of assessment
Provide equal opportunity for all candidates

planning_phase.title: Planning & Preparation
recruiter_activities: Define assessment objectives and competencies
Determine candidate pool and target roles
Set assessment timeline and scheduling windows
Select appropriate test format and items
Establish passing scores and evaluation criteria
Configure proctoring requirements (live or automated)
Plan for accessibility and accommodations
Communicate assessment details to candidates

scheduling_phase.title: Scheduling & Candidate Management
recruiter_activities: Create assessment windows and time slots
Send invitations to candidate pool
Manage candidate confirmations
Track registration and enrollment
Handle rescheduling requests
Send reminders to candidates
Monitor no-show rates
Prepare backup schedules if needed

live_proctoring.recruiter_use: High-stakes assessments, compliance testing, sensitive roles

automated_proctoring.description: Technology-based monitoring using AI and computer vision
automated_proctoring.recruiter_use: Volume assessments, initial screening, remote candidates

post_exam_phase.title: Scoring & Result Compilation
processes: Automatic scoring of objective items (multiple choice, true/false)
Manual review of subjective responses (short answer, performance tasks)

group_analytics.recruiter_use: Assessment effectiveness and candidate pool analysis

validity.definition: Assessment measures what it claims to measure (job-related competencies)
validity.recruiter_action: Select items from Item Bank validated for target role and competencies
best_practices: Use items validated for your candidate population
Review item statistics and performance data

reliability.definition: Assessment results are consistent and reproducible
reliability.recruiter_action: Use standardized procedures and validated item pool

fairness.definition: Assessment doesn't disadvantage candidates based on protected characteristics
fairness.recruiter_action: Review items for bias, provide accommodations, analyze outcomes

security.definition: Assessment integrity is protected from cheating and malpractice
security.recruiter_action: Implement proctoring, verify identities, prevent item exposure
best_practices: Verify candidate identity with FIDO or ID check
Secure item bank from unauthorized access

transparency.definition: Clear communication about assessment purpose, process, and criteria
transparency.recruiter_action: Communicate assessment details to candidates upfront

assessment_design: Passing scores set with defensible criteria

adverse_impact_analysis.definition: Statistical analysis to detect if assessment disparately impacts protected groups
adverse_impact_analysis.recruiter_action: Review ExamRoom analytics for demographic pass rate differences
process: Analyze pass rates by protected groups (race, gender, age, etc.)
Calculate impact ratios (80% rule: lowest rate/highest rate)
Identify items or sections with significant disparities
Review flagged items for potential bias

assessment_selection: Choose items aligned with actual job requirements
Select difficulty appropriate for candidate level
Balance question types for comprehensive evaluation
Use previously validated items when possible
Avoid items with known bias issues
Ensure sufficient item count for reliability
candidate_communication: Provide clear assessment instructions in advance
Explain purpose and how results will be used
Share technical requirements and system specifications
Offer practice tests or sample questions
Confirm scheduling details and time zone
result_interpretation: Compare individual scores to benchmarks and norms
Review competency-level breakdowns, not just total scores
Look for item consistency (item performance patterns)
Account for assessments taken multiple times
Use scores as one factor in hiring decision
continuous_improvement: Review item performance and discrimination statistics
Gather candidate feedback on assessment experience
Update items based on job requirement changes
security_and_integrity: Limit item bank access to authorized personnel
Monitor for suspicious patterns or anomalies

high_volume_screening.scenario: Recruiting for 50 open positions with 500+ applicants
workflow: Select screening assessment from Item Bank (entry-level items)
Configure automated proctoring for efficiency
Set time limit and passing score based on role requirements
Send assessment invitation to all qualified applicants
Monitor completion rates and technical issues
Review automated scoring and ranking
Select top 50-100 candidates for next stage
Analyze candidate pool demographics for bias check

specialized_role_assessment.scenario: Hiring specialized technical role requiring custom assessment
workflow: Interview hiring manager to identify key competencies
Search Item Bank for technical items relevant to role
Supplement with performance-based tasks if needed
Configure live proctoring for complex assessment
Set reasonable time limit for comprehensive evaluation
Pilot test with internal SMEs to validate
Review psychometric properties and timing
Administer to candidate pool with detailed reporting
Conduct competency analysis and recommendations

compliance_regulated_role.scenario: Hiring for regulated industry with compliance requirements
workflow: Review regulatory requirements and competency standards
Select validated assessment from Item Bank
Document assessment validation study
Configure assessment with identity verification (FIDO)
Set audit trail and compliance documentation
Conduct adverse impact analysis beforehand
Administer with full proctoring and recording
Generate compliance documentation report
Maintain records for regulatory review

assessment_customization.description: Tailor assessments to specific roles and competencies
assessment_customization.recruiter_value: Ensure job-relevant evaluation for accurate candidate comparison

item_randomization.description: Randomize question order and options to enhance security
item_randomization.recruiter_value: Prevent cheating and item memorization across candidate pool

adaptive_testing.description: Adjust question difficulty based on candidate responses
adaptive_testing.recruiter_value: More efficient assessment with better discrimination between candidates

automated_scoring.description: Instant objective scoring with configurable rubrics for subjective items
automated_scoring.recruiter_value: Fast turnaround on results without manual scoring delays

comprehensive_reporting.description: Detailed analytics on individual and group performance
comprehensive_reporting.recruiter_value: Data-driven hiring decisions with visual comparisons and benchmarks

identity_verification.description: Multi-factor authentication including FIDO and ID verification
identity_verification.recruiter_value: Confidence that assessment results are from intended candidate

proctoring_options.description: Flexible proctoring - live, automated, or hybrid
proctoring_options.recruiter_value: Balance between security, cost, and candidate experience based on role

accommodation_management.description: Built-in support for accessible testing and accommodations
accommodation_management.recruiter_value: Ensure legal compliance and inclusive hiring practices

audit_trail.description: Complete documentation of all assessment activities
audit_trail.recruiter_value: Regulatory compliance and defensibility of hiring decisions

integration_capabilities.description: API integration with ATS and HRIS systems
integration_capabilities.recruiter_value: Seamless workflow without manual data transfer

recruiter_activities: Assess current hiring and assessment practices
Identify roles where ExamRoom.AI would add value
Define success metrics (time-to-hire, quality of hire, compliance)
Plan assessment strategy for priority roles
Identify Item Bank gaps or custom item needs
Configure ExamRoom.AI account and roles
Review and select appropriate items from Item Bank
Create custom items if needed
Set up assessment templates for priority roles
Configure proctoring settings and security protocols
Establish passing scores and competency mappings
Pilot assessment with small candidate group
Gather feedback from candidates and hiring managers
Validate assessment timing and difficulty
Test proctoring and technical setup
Review psychometric properties and data quality
Make adjustments based on pilot results
Roll out to full recruitment process
Train recruiting team on platform usage
Monitor assessments and provide support
Track metrics against success criteria
Gather ongoing feedback and optimize

platform_basics.question: What is ExamRoom.AI and how does it help with recruitment?
platform_basics.answer: ExamRoom.AI is an assessment platform that enables objective, standardized evaluation of candidates. It manages test questions, administers assessments with proctoring, and provides comprehensive analytics to support hiring decisions.

platform_basics.question: How large is the Item Bank and can I use it for my roles?
platform_basics.answer: The Item Bank contains thousands of validated assessment items across professional, technical, and general competency areas. The Item Bank is searchable and filterable by competency, difficulty, and industry to find items relevant to your roles.

platform_basics.question: Can I create custom assessment items for my organization?
platform_basics.answer: Yes, ExamRoom.AI allows creation of custom assessment items. These go through validation review before deployment to ensure quality and fairness.

administration.question: What is the difference between live and automated proctoring?
administration.answer: Live proctoring uses real human proctors who monitor assessments in real-time. Automated proctoring uses AI and computer vision. Live is more secure but higher cost; automated is scalable and 24/7 but may impact candidate experience.

administration.question: How do I verify candidate identity?
administration.answer: ExamRoom.AI supports multiple identity verification methods including FIDO authentication and government ID verification to ensure assessments are taken by the intended candidate.

administration.question: How long does assessment administration take?
administration.answer: Assessment duration depends on your design - typically 30 minutes to 2 hours. Platform supports variable timing based on item count and complexity.

results_and_compliance.question: How quickly do I get candidate scores?
results_and_compliance.answer: Objective items are scored immediately. If assessment includes subjective items, manual review happens according to your process timeline. ExamRoom provides instant availability for all scoring as soon as grading is complete.

results_and_compliance.question: How do I know my assessment is legally defensible?
results_and_compliance.answer: Use validated items from Item Bank, document assessment design rationale, analyze for adverse impact, provide reasonable accommodations, and maintain complete audit trail. ExamRoom.AI supports all these compliance components.

results_and_compliance.question: Can I accommodate candidates with disabilities?
results_and_compliance.answer: Yes, ExamRoom.AI includes built-in accommodation features including extended time, large print, screen reader compatibility, separate testing space options, and custom accommodations as needed.

compliance_and_fairness: Adverse impact ratio by protected group
